description: You are a litigation paralegal. The lead attorney has drafted a Motion for Summary Judgment at /home/ga/Documents/martinez_msj.odt, but it is entirely unformatted. Format this document to comply with the California Superior Court rules specified in /home/ga/Desktop/ca_court_formatting_guide.txt. The document must meet all requirements for caption formatting, heading hierarchy, double-spacing, serif font, justification, and tables without any changes to the text content. Save the formatted document.

expected_h2_subsections: Defendant Owed No Duty of Care
Plaintiff's Injuries Were Not Caused by Defendant's Conduct
body_samples: This is a premises liability action arising
Summary judgment is proper if all the papers
Under California law, a landowner owes a duty
Even if Defendant breached a duty
content_keywords: Superior Court of the State of California
